description: You are a Security Operations Center (SOC) analyst investigating a potential application-layer DDoS attack. The database is locking up, but total network bandwidth is within normal limits. You suspect an attacker is flooding the system with tiny requests, driving down the average payload size. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'DDoS Threat Triage' containing exactly four graphs: 'Inbound Request Volume' (target: servers.load_balancer.requests.count), 'Inbound Bandwidth Rate' (target: nonNegativeDerivative(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in)), 'Average Payload Size' (target: divideSeries(nonNegativeDerivative(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in), servers.load_balancer.requests.count)), and 'Traffic Anomaly' (target: diffSeries(servers.load_balancer.requests.count, movingAverage(servers.load_balancer.requests.count, 30))).
